sections.paragraph:
Original: צבא

Transliteration: tsâbâ'

Phonetic: tsaw-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go forth, wage war, fight, serve
    1. (Qal)
      1. to wage war, fight, go forth to war
      2. to serve (at sacred tent)
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to go forth, muster

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1865

Part(s) of speech: Verb
